modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty adding clinical faculty to dental hygiene application.

full_description_text: 
During a live chat session, the help desk analyst was asked how to add clinical faculty to the dental hygiene application. The user expressed uncertainty about the process and required guidance on this specific task. This issue pertains to the Student Tracking environment within the Dental Hygiene program.
